name: Cape Cod Fish Chowder#1
recipeIngredient: 4 cups potatoes, peeled and cut into small pieces
1 pkg frozen haddock (1 lb.) or cod fillets - partly thawed and cut into cubes
1 can whole kernel corn (12 to 16 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion in butter until soft in a kettle.
2. Add potatoes, salt, basil, pepper, and water; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
3. Place fish on top of potatoes; cover and simmer for another 15 minutes or until the fish flakes easily and the potatoes are tender.
4. Stir in corn and liquid from the can with evaporated milk. Cover and heat just to boiling.
5. You may sprinkle with chopped parsley and pimento, if desired. Serves 6.
